summary: Tested Distribution module as separate top-level module with scalable module selector. All 7 features verified successfully - module selector shows 3 options (Sales, Production, Distribution), switching modules navigates correctly, Distribution sidebar shows correct items, Sales sidebar no longer has Distribution section, module selection persists across navigation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Distribution module is now a separate top-level module with scalable dropdown selector. Module selector has data-testid='module-selector'. Use select_option() to change modules. Distribution module shows: Distributors, Stock Dashboard, SKU Management, Files & Documents, Company Profile, Team. Module context stored in localStorage per user.
production_module_note: Production module shows 'Module Not Available' message - this is expected tenant configuration behavior, not a bug. The sidebar still shows Production-specific items (Vendors, SKU Management, Files & Documents, Company Profile, Team).

design_review.module_selector: Clean dropdown with chevron icon, shows current module indicator below
design_review.module_indicator: Shows '[Module] Module Active' text with appropriate icon (Store for Sales, Factory for Production, Truck for Distribution)
design_review.sidebar_layout: Proper grouping of navigation items by category
design_review.dual_sidebar_on_detail: Main module sidebar + distributor detail sidebar work together correctly
